description.ko: 빛조차 심연의 영원한 중력에 삼켜지는 우주 가장 먼 곳의 고요하고도 경이로운 아름다움을 탐험합니다.
description.en: A journey into the silent, terrifying beauty of the universe's furthest reaches, where light is consumed by the eternal gravity of the abyss.

prompt: Hyper-realistic cinematic shot of a vast cosmic abyss, swirling dark matter nebulae in obsidian and deep violet hues, glowing ethereal particles drifting into a central gravitational singularity, infinite depth, stars flickering in the far distance, ultra-detailed 8k resolution, cosmic horror aesthetic.
